THEUNDERSTUDY-PLANNED.title: Planned
THEUNDERSTUDY-PLANNED.description: When a card becomes [gold]Planned[/gold], it also becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNED.title: Tuned
THEUNDERSTUDY-TUNED.description: Becomes [gold]Unplayable[/gold] when played. Increases damage or [gold]Block[/gold] by 1 for each card with [gold]Tuned[/gold].
THEUNDERSTUDY-STABLE.title: Stable
THEUNDERSTUDY-STABLE.description: May not be modified or turned [gold]Unplayable[/gold] during combat.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INVERT.title: Invert
THEUNDERSTUDY-INVERT.description: Convert this many of each invertible debuff into buffs. Not all debuffs are invertible.
THEUNDERSTUDY-INVERTIBLE.title: Invertible
THEUNDERSTUDY-INVERTIBLE.description: A debuff that can be converted into a buff. Not all debuffs are invertible.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SWAP.title: Swap
THEUNDERSTUDY-SWAP.description:
Give your most recently changed [gold]swappable[/gold] debuff to ALL enemies.
Take each enemy's most recently changed [gold]swappable[/gold] buff.
Up to [blue]10[/blue] of each.
THEUNDERSTUDY-SWAPPABLE.title: Swappable
THEUNDERSTUDY-SWAPPABLE.description: A universal buff or debuff that Swap can move between you and enemies. Not all buffs and debuffs are swappable.
